markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To understand foundational SEO principles and adapt to the AI-driven search landscape.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**SEO is Evolving, Not Dying:** The focus has shifted from keywords to user intent and high-quality content that meets Google's E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authority, Trust) standards.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [**AEO is the New Frontier:** AI-Enhanced Optimization (AEO) requires formatting content for AI parsing (e.g., FAQs, tables) and using AI tools to reverse-engineer what ranks.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [**The 4 Cs Framework Guides Strategy:** A new framework (Craving, Competition, Composition, Conversion) ensures content is built around user intent, competitive analysis, and clear calls to action.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
  - [**SEMrush & Atlas Workflow:** The standard process is to find keywords in SEMrush, import them to Airtable, and generate assignment briefs in Atlas, ensuring one article per keyword to prevent cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2671.0)

## Topics

### SEO's Evolution: From Keywords to Intent

  - [SEO has evolved from simple keyword matching to understanding complex user intent.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [**Key Historical Shifts:**](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
      - [**Early 2000s:** Keyword-focused; black-hat tactics like keyword stuffing were common.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
      - [**2007–2014 (Content Marketing):** Focus shifted to content quality and context.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
      - [**2015–2022 (Hub & Spoke):** Topic clusters and answering "People Also Ask" questions became standard.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [**Today (Quality & Intent):** Google prioritizes deep expertise and original data, driven by its E-E-A-T framework.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

### The New Searcher & AI-Enhanced Optimization (AEO)

  - [Users now interact with AI agents (e.g., Alexa, Siri) via voice, not just text.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [**Impact on SEO:** AI agents still process traditional SEO signals (proximity, delivery, hours) to generate answers.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [**AEO Principles:**](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
      - [**Format for AI Parsing:** Use clean structures, definitions, comparisons, and FAQs.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
      - [**Prioritize Clarity:** Direct first sentences and simple language are key.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
      - [**Reverse-Engineer:** Use AI to analyze what it cites.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
        1.  [Ask an AI agent a question.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
        2.  [Analyze the cited sources for structure, content, and format.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
        3.  [Replicate successful patterns in your own content.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)

### The 4 Cs Content Framework

  - [A framework for creating content that aligns with modern SEO and AEO.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
  - [**1. Craving:** Understand user intent (Informational, Navigational, Commercial, Transactional).](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [**2. Competition:** Analyze SERP results to identify content gaps and differentiation opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [**3. Composition:** Generate content in Atlas, applying AEO principles (e.g., FAQs, tables).](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2091.0)
  - [**4. Conversion:** Ensure content is actionable with clear CTAs, lead magnets, and internal/external links.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)

### Practical Workflow: SEMrush → Airtable → Atlas

  - [A live demo showed the standard process for keyword research and content generation.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2671.0)
  - [**1. Keyword Research (SEMrush):**](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2723.0)
      - [Use the Keyword Magic Tool to find keywords with high volume and low difficulty.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2808.0)
      - [Use the Keyword Gap tool to find keywords competitors rank for that you don't.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=3696.0)
  - [**2. Import to Airtable:**](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2947.0)
      - [Export selected keywords from SEMrush as a CSV.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2925.0)
      - [Import the CSV into the client's Content OS in Airtable, mapping all data fields correctly.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2947.0)
  - [**3. Generate Assignments (Atlas):**](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=4067.0)
      - [In Atlas, import the keyword list to the assignments pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=4094.0)
      - [Set `validate relevance` to `true` to have Atlas analyze the SERP and generate a brief based on the dominant content type (e.g., listicle, guide).](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=4260.0)
  - [**Critical Rule:** Create only one article per keyword to prevent "cannibalization," where multiple pages compete for the same search term.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=4118.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marisol:**](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2420.0)
      - [Share the Notion blueprint for content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=3247.0)
      - [Continue testing and refining Atlas pipeline artifacts for better SEO/AEO output.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2420.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
      - [Apply the 4 Cs framework to new content projects.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
      - [Use AI tools to reverse-engineer successful content structures.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
      - [Adhere to the "one article per keyword" rule.](https://fathom.video/share/hs-Deqa9wzikR7bC_qiNM4coFzLCP3yB?tab=summary&timestamp=4118.0)
